2605.18740.title: Vision-OPD: Learning to See Fine Details for Multimodal LLMs via On-Policy Self-Distillation
2605.18740.paper_summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) still struggle with fine-grained visual understanding, where answers often depend on small but decisive evidence in the full image. We observe a regional-to-global perception gap: the same MLLM answers fine-grained questions more accurately when conditioned on evidence-centered crops than on the corresponding full images, suggesting that many failures stem from difficulty to focus on relevant evidence rather than insufficient local recognition ability. Motivated by this observation, we propose Vision-OPD (Vision On-Policy Distillation), a regional-to-global self-distillation framework that transfers the model's own privileged regional perception to its full-image policy. Vision-OPD instantiates two conditional policies from the same MLLM: a crop-conditioned teacher and a full-image-conditioned student. The student generates on-policy rollouts, and Vision-OPD minimizes token-level divergence between the teacher and student next-token distributions along these rollouts. This enables the model to internalize the benefit of visual zooming without external teacher models, ground-truth labels, reward verifiers, or inference-time tool use. Experiments on multiple fine-grained visual understanding benchmarks show that Vision-OPD models achieve competitive or superior performance against much larger open-source, closed-source, and "Thinking-with-Images" agentic models.
2605.18740.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在細緻的視覺理解上仍然存在困難，答案往往依賴於整幅圖像中小而關鍵的證據。我們觀察到一種區域到全局的感知差距：當基於以證據為中心的裁剪圖像時，同一個MLLM對細緻問題的回答更為準確，而不是基於相應的全圖，這表明許多失敗源於難以專注於相關證據，而非不足的局部識別能力。受到這一觀察的啟發，我們提出了Vision-OPD（視覺在線策略蒸餾），這是一個區域到全局的自我蒸餾框架，將模型自身的特權區域感知轉移到其全圖策略上。Vision-OPD從同一個MLLM實例化了兩個條件策略：一個是基於裁剪圖像的教師，另一個是基於全圖的學生。學生生成在線策略的回合，Vision-OPD最小化教師和學生在這些回合中的下一個標記分佈之間的標記級別差異。這使得模型能夠內化視覺縮放的好處，而不需要外部教師模型、真實標籤、獎勵驗證器或推理時工具的使用。在多個細緻視覺理解基準上的實驗顯示，Vision-OPD模型在性能上達到了與更大開源、閉源和“思考與圖像”代理模型的競爭或優越表現。
2605.18740.author: Qianhao Yuan et.al.
2605.18740.authors: Qianhao Yuan, Jie Lou, Xing Yu, Hongyu Lin, Le Sun, Xianpei Han, Yaojie Lu
